data.title: Australians lead in crypto curiosity, with user base set to reach 11.16 million; 41% already involved.
data.description: It is anticipated that the number of cryptocurrency users in Australia will increase to 11.16 million by the upcoming year, indicating that around 41% of the Australian population will be engaged in cryptocurrency activities.

data.title: Analysts anticipate upcoming altcoin season with liquidity shifting to risk assets, but indicators remain at bear market lows.
data.description: According to analysts in the crypto industry, there are signs that the altcoin season may be approaching, with a shift in liquidity towards risk assets. However, indicators for the altcoin season are currently at their lowest levels seen during bear markets. This suggests that despite the potential for a surge in altcoin activity, market conditions remain challenging.

BoFA: Crypto records $0.3 bln outflow, first in 10 weeks.
Gold received $8.7 billion inflow in the week to Wednesday, the largest weekly inflow on record - BofA citing EPFR data
BoFA: Bull & Bear Indicator falls to 6.2 from 6.4.

data.title: WSPN introduces WSPN Checkout, a stablecoin payment infrastructure for e-commerce. Launch in Oct 2025.
data.description: In Tortola, within the British Virgin Islands, on October 24, 2025, the Worldwide Stablecoin Payment Network (WSPN) introduced WSPN Checkout, a new payment solution featuring stablecoin technology. WSPN, a prominent provider of advanced stablecoin infrastructure, is behind this development. The launch of WSPN Checkout marks a significant milestone in the company's efforts to modernize payments.

data.title: Positive data on SVF-001 for chronic hepatitis B/D presented by SVF Vaccines, a portfolio company of Karolinska Development.
data.description: Karolinska Development AB, a company listed on Nasdaq Stockholm under the ticker symbol KDEV, has revealed that its portfolio firm SVF Vaccines shared encouraging findings from a preclinical examination of its immunotherapy SVF-001 aimed at combatting chronic hepatitis B and D. This update was disclosed at the Molecular Biology of HBV conference in Berlin and the DeltaCure conference in Hannover.

data.title: Duni Group reports increased net sales of SEK 1,972 million in Q3 despite challenging market conditions.
data.description: In Malmö, Sweden, from July 1 to September 30, 2025, there was a rise in net sales to SEK 1,972 million from SEK 1,910 million, showing a 3.3% increase. When adjusted for exchange rate fluctuations, the net sales saw a 7.9% growth. Despite challenging market conditions, there was an enhanced operating profit during this period.

data.title: Quadient expands European open locker network in Italy. Launch of Parcel Pending network is strategic milestone in European expansion.
data.description: Quadient (Euronext Paris: QDT), a leading global intelligent automation platform that facilitates secure and expert business interactions, revealed the introduction of the Parcel Pending by Quadient open locker network in Italy. This move signifies a significant advancement in its European growth strategy.
Cybersecurity firm NRD achieves milestone in Bangladesh, eyes regional growth after successful phase.

data.title: Energy secretary proposes faster grid access for AI and crypto miners. CEO of CleanSpark supports, says expedited connections to be available.
data.description: The CEO of CleanSpark, S. Matthew Schultz, announced that the updated regulations will facilitate quicker links for Bitcoin mining and data centers.

data.title: 2009 wallet linked to Satoshi started moving Bitcoin after a decade; inactive since 2011, mined coins in 2009.
data.description: The Bitcoin whale from the era of Satoshi Nakamoto was most recently active in June 2011. This whale had accumulated its coins through mining operations conducted between April and June 2009, a short period after the Bitcoin network was launched.

data.title: Aussies lead in crypto interest with 11.16M users expected by next year, as 41% of population engages in cryptocurrencies.
data.description: It is anticipated that the number of cryptocurrency users in Australia will surge to 11.16 million by the upcoming year, representing almost 41% of the Australian population engaged in cryptocurrency activities.

data.title: Individual miner earns $347K by successfully mining block 920,440, showcasing complete self-sovereignty.
data.description: One individual Bitcoin miner successfully solved block 920,440 independently and received a substantial reward for their efforts.

data.title: DeFi perpetuals trading hits $1T+ in October, marked by surge in volume from Hyperliquid, Aster, and Lighter. Beat August record by a week.
data.description: In October, decentralized perpetuals trading volume surged to surpass $1 trillion, driven by Hyperliquid, Aster, and Lighter. This figure exceeded August's total with a week remaining in the month.
Dollar/yen hits two week high of 153.01, last up 0.24% at 152.96
